sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110080" key="faqi/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φαθί</orth> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φάθι</orth>, <sense id="n110080.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φημί.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
